properties.verseOrder: V1 C2 V3 C2 V4 C2

verse.name: V1
verse.lines: Why do they leave? Isn't this Message still the same? Why do they seek for something more than simplicity? Why do they turn, Turn their backs on You, oh, Lord? Why do they yearn for something more?

verse.name: C2
verse.lines: Your truth is what I follow It will still be true tomorrow What I believe Is not the work of any man, His kingdom can't be shaken On this glorious foundation While others fall, here I stand.

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: I know You said there's a great falling away, I know they tried To complicate what You said, But in my soul, I'm sure of the Rock I stand upon One thing I know, I will press on.

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: On Christ, the solid Rock, I stand All other ground is sinking sand While others fall, here I stand.
